name: 联影智能 AI 能力平台

tagline.zh: 冠脉 CTA 分割与狭窄测量

description.zh: 对冠脉 CTA(CCTA) 进行 AI 自动分割与重建，提取心脏与冠脉中心线，支持狭窄测量与多视图可视化
description.en: AI auto-segmentation and reconstruction for coronary CTA (CCTA) — extracts heart and coronary centerlines and supports stenosis measurement and multi-view visualization

fda.productCodeName: Medical Image Management and Processing System (21 CFR 892.2050)
fda.applicant: Shanghai United Imaging Intelligence Co., Ltd.

tagline.zh: 主动脉 CTA 分割与腔径测量

description.zh: 对主动脉 CTA 进行 AI 自动分割与重建，提取主干与分支中心线，支持腔径测量与多视图可视化
description.en: AI auto-segmentation and reconstruction for aortic CTA — extracts trunk and branch centerlines and supports lumen-diameter measurement and multi-view visualization

fda.productCodeName: Medical Image Management and Processing System (21 CFR 892.2050)
fda.applicant: Shanghai United Imaging Intelligence Co., Ltd.

tagline.zh: 肺动脉 CTPA 分割与测量

description.zh: 对肺动脉 CTA(CTPA) 进行 AI 自动分割与重建，提取动/静脉中心线并支持测量与多视图可视化
description.en: AI auto-segmentation and reconstruction for pulmonary CTA (CTPA) — extracts artery/vein centerlines and supports measurement and multi-view visualization

fda.productCodeName: Medical Image Management and Processing System (21 CFR 892.2050)
fda.applicant: Shanghai United Imaging Intelligence Co., Ltd.

tagline.zh: 头颈 CTA 血管/骨分割与测量

description.zh: 对头颈 CTA 进行 AI 自动分割与重建，分离血管与骨、提取中心线并支持测量与多视图可视化
description.en: AI auto-segmentation and reconstruction for head & neck CTA — separates vessel and bone, extracts centerlines and supports measurement and multi-view visualization

fda.productCodeName: Medical Image Management and Processing System (21 CFR 892.2050)
fda.applicant: Shanghai United Imaging Intelligence Co., Ltd.

tagline.zh: 下肢 CTA 血管/骨分割与狭窄测量

description.zh: 对下肢 CTA 进行 AI 自动分割与重建，分离血管与骨、提取中心线并支持 ROI 与狭窄测量
description.en: AI auto-segmentation and reconstruction for lower-extremity CTA — separates vessel and bone, extracts centerlines and supports ROI and stenosis measurement

fda.productCodeName: Medical Image Management and Processing System (21 CFR 892.2050)
fda.applicant: Shanghai United Imaging Intelligence Co., Ltd.
